examples: With his last remaining mana he gave his life and spark to Karn.
With his last strength, Venser teleported his heart into Karn, curing the golem.
Cured and lucid once again, Karn spoke with Elspeth, who told him that he could not kill all the Phyrexians.
Announcing Karn's sentence of 18 months, Judge Lucraft said he had considered whether it could be suspended.
"You have to strengthen them all the way up to that last line of defense, " Karn said.
